description:
The girl who became a ray of light illuminating upon this chaotic internet of today... OMGkawaiiAngel. While the sensational KAngel`s actions stir public opinion, the up-and-coming streaming group Karamazov keeps an eye on her. Meanwhile, Kache heads to work at a theme café. Here, a brand-new story about the Internet Angel begins.
Source: Crunchyroll
